transcript.text: I'm an automated medical assistant. If this is an emergency, hang up and call 911. Do you consent to continue? (yes/no)
Yes.
What is your main medical concern today?
I have lower abdominal pain.
When did your lower abdominal pain start?
2 days ago.
Can you describe the quality and exact location of your lower abdominal pain?
It is left side lower abdomen and very sharp.
Any fever, chills, or nausea?
Yes.
Can you tell me if you have noticed any changes in your bowel movements or any blood in your stool?
No.
Any urinary symptoms like pain with urination, increased frequency, or blood in urine?
No.
Can you tell me more about the fever and nausea, such as how high the fever is and if you have vomited?
Does fever go back to 1 0 2, and I have I'm not sure if it's now vomiting.
Have you noticed any vaginal symptoms such as abnormal discharge or bleeding?
Hello?
Can you tell me if you have missed your last menstrual period or if there is any chance you could be pregnant?
Hello?
Can you tell me if there is any chance you could be pregnant or if you have missed your last menstrual period?
No. They've done it.
Have you noticed any vaginal discharge, bleeding, or pain during intercourse recently?
